title: I See Lava (Fork)
description: A client-side mod that makes lava translucent.
body:
<center> 
This mod just changes lava to render translucent like the following:

![Translucent Lava](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/02c64f2e88e1c3ee62017f2698898191e68f051f_0.webp)

It does not affect the red overlay you get when in Lava.

NOTE: THIS ALSO USES A CUSTOM TEXTURE SO MAY BREAK WITH TEXTUREPACKS

Added a second version that has a menu that allows adjusting how translucent you want the lava.
</center>
